textByHash.9b4fdc7224bc167ccfc470d87fd3f3068f89f41a: How curious? I have not seen a creature of your kind for many years. You have ventured into the Nexus human - I should warn you to be aware of the Abyssal Sires.
textByHash.2c529b392371e6c4f75789a1f06d3365e2dde978: Ah... Time does not pass in the Abyss at the same rate that it does in your realm, but nevertheless I have been in this place for aeons.
textByHash.ad4b66bb84d40de8f60dcd96049f37f477b5a02f: Indeed, when I was last in your realm, the armies of Zamorak were battling the other gods for control, and we sought reinforcements from any plane we could reach.
textByHash.ba185bb87c8c98f92c30be961ecf39ba24b5d325: That was how I came here. We broke through to the Abyss, seeking allies for our cause, but instead I ended up a prisoner in this place, unable to leave, while the God Wars continued without me.
textByHash.36c2edefa02b860b29598300e804234aece5b5c9: There is something you can do here, human. In fact it may perhaps benefit us both.
textByHash.6313aeb3630b49eb78cbd3d542120afb94d4f5ec: Bring me a spine, a claw and an axon from the Abyssal Sires, and I shall construct them into a mighty weapon for you. Yes, we shall both benefit from this.
textByHash.8881e21d0dc174e003766e3869a98ebc6036b66e: The Sires are the engineers of this living pocket universe known to you and I as the Abyss.
textByHash.a018ae448aa3efc46b0b1e1ac3c91cdb50b52ae8: At the hands of the 'Chaos God', Zamorak, like myself, they too were cast down and imprisoned in this living tomb.
textByHash.7183b2153c9b904a727d0af5262fc0b61db98a62: They worked for centuries attempting to escape the pull of the Abyss but as food resources began to deplete they knew that their only chance for survival was to construct this Nexus.
textByHash.ec0a94854f51f7cab58d03b7ad5bcd0a45934425: They absorb flesh and bone of their demon kin, weaving it into the fabric of these very walls. Here they have remained in deep stasis, asleep.
textByHash.3803ed5f05d8f9a5b0cc84fdf77f70eacc54554b: If you succeed in awakening them, they will no doubt unleash their full fury upon you. Someone of your calibre should be able to deal with them though, especially with the shadows on your side...
textByHash.638d24f7e91847e29261bf2a41bfb171363c30c0: If you succeed in killing a Sire, you may be fortunate enough to find one of its unsired offspring among its remains. Bring the Unsired here, to the Font of Consumption.
textByHash.03e224db3617ac4f470a94716ac7380299e6961e: By placing the Unsired into the Font, I will be able to consume its flesh and perhaps you will receive something worth having.
textByHash.9255b3e44ca4e46186cf16727c6e4785f9d74f40: I did not ask you to bring me anything, human.
textByHash.1ba4d5d9d6ba4d58c74301f58ce8b7281e3ddd1e: Have you harvested any components for me?
textByHash.28391aca6840d164af8269f3cb5eec08022c7aed: I shall use the components to construct a mighty weapon for you. Rest assured, the process will be beneficial to both of us.
textByHash.45c9823e28e693045ed78b188129ee0baa0d0352: I still require from an Abyssal Sire.
textByHash.25645b6937c1332e70fec0d78e4d1ca94eefec46: I now have all the components I require, so here is the weapon I promised you.
textByHash.d8554863ff46f00b3c941d506d24b3675f34294f: You have served me well, it is good to see that you humans are still as gullible as ever!
textByHash.845228d86c9a576876b362276c06fa8d4fae68f9: Bringing me those body parts from the Sires has now granted me enough teleportation energy to leave this living hell hole. Perhaps I will pay your realm a visit and there will be much to harvest!
textByHash.4c011fb2d83c16c0e4171f98f46abc831eb3404a: Have you not learned yet, appearances can be deceiving. You hold in your hands a living weapon whose power is rivalled by few weapons from your world, use it wisely.
textByHash.c769abbf9ac7cd21945a1341f90a77354d69346f: Do not think that I am ungrateful for my freedom human. I will leave you this ancient tome that will instruct you in creating more of these weapons in future.
textByHash.0d301b4ccef72ba3442b51747e9b7a032366c097: Just use the three components on the book, and it will do the rest. You can get spare copies here any time you need.
textByHash.57a181c18f04dea79479aa6d456b11fe03c208cf: So be it... I will await you on the fields of blood!
textByHash.73f50114e17bd631b7d7fb5fe20493434994719f: I do not require anything further from you, human.
